name: Pink Dot Bear Doll Car Carrier for 14" - 16" Dolls - Gigglescape™
description:
Let your child take their favorite baby doll anywhere they want to go with this Dot Bear Doll Car Carrier from Gigglescape™. This doll car carrier is designed in pink with dots and a bear face with ears on the top hood and hanging star accent to take a doll or stuffed animal for a ride in fun style. Plus, the carrier's buckle straps ensure that their doll is securely fastened while they're on the move. Compatible with most 14–16-inch dolls, this car carrier is designed for children ages two and up.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
